🚀 Big Launches.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
🚀 Big Launches.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Darts Foundation
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Darts has become a widely used open-source Python library for time series analysis.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Internalizing the Future: A Unified Agentic Training Paradigm for World Model Planning
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have demonstrated strong capability in sequential decision-making, yet they remains fundamentally reactive in long-horizon tasks.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Towards Reliable and Robust LLM Planning: Symbolic Feedback-Driven Iterative Self-Refinement Framework
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Large language models (LLMs) have attracted widespread attention from academia and industry, yet their deployment raises critical security concerns regarding robustness and reliability.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Prosecutors used ChatGPT logs as evidence in the Palisades fire trial
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Prosecutors turned to location data from the defendant's iPhone, security camera footage, and witness testimony, as well as his ChatGPT logs, to make their case.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: AI-Model Network: Concept, Current State and Future
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: The paper discusses the concept, current state, and future of AI-model networks, highlighting their potential applications and challenges.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Odyssey: Constructing Verifiable Local Truth-Preserving Foundation Models
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: The paper introduces a categorical framework called ODYSSEY for constructing verifiable, local truth-preserving foundation models as compositions of foundries.

tool_of_day.title: Darts Foundation
tool_of_day.summary: Darts has become a widely used open-source Python library for time series analysis.

hot_take: The increasing focus on responsible AI and the use of AI in real-world applications, such as the Palisades fire trial, highlights the need for AI developers to prioritize transparency and accountability in their work.
